551.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The people will continue to be in a good state as long as they hasten to break the fast.'
551.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang-orang akan terus berada dalam keadaan baik selama mereka menyegerakan berbuka puasa.'

552.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I gave the Messenger of Allah ﷺ water to drink with my own hands from the well of Buda'ah.'
552.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku memberi Rasulullah ﷺ minum dengan tanganku sendiri dari sumur Buda'ah.'

553.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) through his son 'Abbas that he was with the Prophet ﷺ at al-Khandaq (the trench). The Prophet ﷺ took the pickaxe, struck the earth, and hit a rock. He laughed. When asked why, he said: 'I laughed at people who will be brought from the east in chains being driven to Paradise.'
553.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui putranya 'Abbas bahwa ia bersama Nabi ﷺ di al-Khandaq (parit). Nabi ﷺ mengambil kapak, memukul tanah, dan mengenai batu. Beliau tertawa. Ketika ditanya mengapa, beliau bersabda: 'Aku tertawa melihat orang-orang yang akan dibawa dari timur dalam belenggu digiring ke surga.'

554.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: I was sent and the Hour is like this — and he pointed with his index finger and middle finger together.'
554.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Aku diutus dan Kiamat adalah seperti ini — dan beliau menunjuk dengan jari telunjuk dan jari tengahnya bersama-sama.'

555.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ came to the mosque while Abu Bakr was leading prayer. Abu Bakr saw the Prophet ﷺ, raised his hands as if in supplication, then stepped back to join the row. The Prophet ﷺ came forward and led the prayer. Afterward the Prophet ﷺ asked Abu Bakr why he did not stay when motioned to. Abu Bakr replied it was not fitting for him to lead prayer in front of the Prophet ﷺ.
555.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ datang ke masjid sementara Abu Bakr sedang memimpin shalat. Abu Bakr melihat Nabi ﷺ, mengangkat tangannya seolah berdoa, lalu mundur bergabung dengan barisan. Nabi ﷺ maju dan memimpin shalat. Setelahnya Nabi ﷺ bertanya kepada Abu Bakr mengapa ia tidak tetap di tempatnya ketika diberi isyarat. Abu Bakr menjawab bahwa tidak pantas baginya untuk memimpin shalat di depan Nabi ﷺ.

556.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would give the salutation in his prayer to the right and to the left until the whiteness of his cheeks could be seen.
556.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengucapkan salam dalam shalatnya ke kanan dan ke kiri hingga putihnya pipinya dapat terlihat.

557.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Among you is the Book of Allah which the black and the red and the white can learn. Learn it before a time comes when people will learn it yet it will not pass beyond their throats. They will straighten it like an arrow is straightened, seeking their reward early rather than deferring it.'
557.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Di antara kalian terdapat Kitab Allah yang dapat dipelajari oleh yang berkulit hitam, merah, dan putih. Pelajarilah sebelum datang suatu zaman ketika orang-orang mempelajarinya namun tidak melampaui tenggorokan mereka. Mereka meluruskannya seperti anak panah diluruskan, mengambil pahalanya dengan segera daripada menundanya.'

558.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If there is bad omen in anything, it is in the woman, the horse, and the dwelling.'
558.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika ada kesialan dalam sesuatu, maka ada pada wanita, kuda, dan tempat tinggal.'

559.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that a drink was brought to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he drank from it. To his right was a young boy and to his left were the elders. He asked the boy: 'Do you permit me to give these elders?' The boy said: 'By Allah, O Messenger of Allah, I would not prefer anyone over my share from you.'
559.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa sebuah minuman dibawa kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan beliau meminumnya. Di sebelah kanannya ada seorang anak laki-laki dan di sebelah kirinya ada para orang tua. Beliau bertanya kepada anak itu: 'Apakah kamu mengizinkan aku memberikan kepada para orang tua ini?' Anak itu berkata: 'Demi Allah, wahai Rasulullah, aku tidak akan mendahulukan siapapun atas bagianku darimu.'

560.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: Going out in the morning in the path of Allah is better than the world and everything in it. Going out in the evening in the path of Allah is better than the world and everything in it. And a spot the size of a whip in Paradise is better than the world and everything in it.'
560.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Berangkat di pagi hari di jalan Allah lebih baik dari dunia dan segala isinya. Berangkat di sore hari di jalan Allah lebih baik dari dunia dan segala isinya. Dan tempat seluas cambuk di surga lebih baik dari dunia dan segala isinya.'

561.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Usayd (may Allah be pleased with him) and Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed by them and entered upon a woman. When he said 'Give yourself to me,' she said: 'Does a queen give herself to a commoner?' This refers to the well-known incident of a woman who sought refuge with Allah from the Prophet ﷺ after being brought as a potential bride, and she was allowed to go.
561.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Usayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) dan Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melewati mereka dan masuk menemui seorang wanita. Ketika beliau berkata 'Hibahkan dirimu kepadaku,' ia berkata: 'Apakah seorang ratu menghibahkan dirinya kepada rakyat biasa?' Ini merujuk pada kejadian terkenal seorang wanita yang berlindung kepada Allah dari Nabi ﷺ setelah dibawa sebagai calon pengantin wanita, dan ia diizinkan pergi.

562.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The people will continue to be in a good state as long as they hasten to break the fast.'
562.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang-orang akan terus berada dalam keadaan baik selama mereka menyegerakan berbuka puasa.'

563.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was asked about the minbar — from what kind of wood it was made. He said: 'By Allah, I know from what wood it is made and who made it and what day it was placed.' A woman had the minbar made with three steps and sent it to the Prophet ﷺ. On the first day it was placed, the Prophet ﷺ prayed on it, said takbir, bowed, then stepped down backward and prostrated, then climbed back up, until prayer was complete.
563.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia ditanya tentang mimbar — dari kayu apa itu dibuat. Ia berkata: 'Demi Allah, aku tahu dari kayu apa itu dibuat dan siapa yang membuatnya dan hari apa itu diletakkan.' Seorang wanita memesan mimbar dengan tiga anak tangga dan mengirimkannya kepada Nabi ﷺ. Pada hari pertama diletakkan, Nabi ﷺ shalat di atasnya, mengucapkan takbir, ruku, lalu turun mundur dan bersujud, lalu naik kembali, hingga shalat selesai.

564.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Standing guard (ribat) for one day in the path of Allah is better than the world and everything on it. Going out in the evening or morning in the path of Allah is better than the world and everything on it. And a spot the size of one of your whips in Paradise is better than the world and everything on it.'
564.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Berjaga (ribat) satu hari di jalan Allah lebih baik dari dunia dan segala isinya. Berangkat di sore hari atau pagi hari di jalan Allah lebih baik dari dunia dan segala isinya. Dan tempat seluas cambuk salah seorang dari kalian di surga lebih baik dari dunia dan segala isinya.'

565.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I will be your forerunner at the Pond (al-Hawd). Whoever comes to it will drink, and whoever drinks will never be thirsty again. Some people will come to me whom I know and who know me, then a barrier will be placed between me and them.' Abu Hazim said al-Nu'man ibn Abi 'Ayyash heard him and added the detail that the Prophet ﷺ will say: 'Away with them, away with them, for those who changed after me.'
565.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku akan menjadi pendahulumu di Telaga (al-Hawd). Barangsiapa mendatanginya akan minum, dan barangsiapa minum tidak akan pernah haus lagi. Beberapa orang akan mendatangiku yang aku kenal dan yang mengenalku, kemudian sebuah penghalang akan dipasang antara aku dan mereka.' Abu Hazim berkata al-Nu'man ibn Abi 'Ayyash mendengarnya dan menambahkan detail bahwa Nabi ﷺ akan berkata: 'Enyahlah mereka, enyahlah mereka, karena mereka yang berubah setelahku.'

566.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'This minbar of mine is upon one of the gateways of Paradise.'
566.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Mimbarku ini berada di atas salah satu gerbang surga.'

567.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man from the tribe of Aslam came to the Prophet ﷺ and confessed to fornication, naming the woman. The Prophet ﷺ sent for the woman and asked her about it. She denied it. So the Prophet ﷺ applied the hadd punishment on the man and left the woman alone.
567.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki dari suku Aslam datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan mengaku telah berzina, menyebutkan nama wanita tersebut. Nabi ﷺ mengutus seseorang menemui wanita itu dan menanyainya tentang hal tersebut. Ia mengingkarinya. Maka Nabi ﷺ menerapkan hukum hadd kepada laki-laki itu dan membiarkan wanita itu.

568.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The people of Paradise will look at the chambers of Paradise just as you look at a star in the sky.' Abu Hazim narrated this to al-Nu'man ibn Abi 'Ayyash who said: 'I bear witness that Abu Sa'id al-Khudri added: just as you look at the brilliant star on the eastern or western horizon.'
568.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Penduduk surga akan melihat kamar-kamar surga seperti kalian melihat bintang di langit.' Abu Hazim meriwayatkan ini kepada al-Nu'man ibn Abi 'Ayyash yang berkata: 'Aku bersaksi bahwa Abu Sa'id al-Khudri menambahkan: seperti kalian melihat bintang yang bercahaya di ufuk timur atau barat.'

569.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The believer among the people of faith is like the head to the body — the believer feels pain for the people of faith just as the body feels pain for what is in the head.'
569.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Sa'idi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Seorang mukmin di antara orang-orang beriman adalah seperti kepala bagi tubuh — seorang mukmin merasakan sakit untuk orang-orang beriman seperti tubuh merasakan sakit untuk apa yang ada di kepala.'

570.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'By the One in Whose hand is my soul, you will indeed follow the ways of those before you exactly, step for step.'
570.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Demi Dzat yang jiwaku berada di tangan-Nya, kalian pasti akan mengikuti jalan-jalan orang-orang sebelum kalian dengan tepat, langkah demi langkah.'

571.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'O Allah, do not let me reach a time — or: do not let you reach a time — when the scholar is not followed and the forbearing one is not respected. Their hearts are the hearts of non-Arabs but their tongues are Arabic tongues.'
571.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ya Allah, janganlah aku mencapai suatu zaman — atau: janganlah kalian mencapai suatu zaman — ketika ulama tidak diikuti dan orang yang sabar tidak dihormati. Hati mereka adalah hati orang-orang non-Arab tetapi lidah mereka adalah lidah Arab.'

572.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sahl ibn Sa'd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: Do not revile Tubba', for he had indeed accepted Islam.'
572.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sahl ibn Sa'd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Janganlah mencaci Tubba', karena ia sesungguhnya telah memeluk Islam.'

573.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Zayd 'Amr ibn Akhtab al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ asked for water. He brought a bowl of water and there was a hair in it. He removed it and handed the water to him. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'O Allah, make him beautiful.' Abu Zayd said: 'I saw him at the age of ninety-four and there was not a single white hair in his beard.'
573.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Zayd 'Amr ibn Akhtab al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ meminta air. Ia membawa semangkuk air dan ada sehelai rambut di dalamnya. Ia mengambilnya lalu menyerahkan air itu kepada beliau. Nabi ﷺ berdoa: 'Ya Allah, percantiklah dia.' Abu Zayd berkata: 'Aku melihatnya di usia sembilan puluh empat tahun dan tidak ada satu pun rambut putih di janggutnya.'

574.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Zayd 'Amr ibn Akhtab (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I saw the Seal of Prophethood between the shoulders of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, like a man who placed his three fingers together in this manner. And I touched it with my hand.'
574.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Zayd 'Amr ibn Akhtab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku melihat Cap Kenabian di antara kedua bahu Rasulullah ﷺ, seperti seorang laki-laki yang meletakkan tiga jarinya bersama seperti ini. Dan aku menyentuhnya dengan tanganku.'

575.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Zayd 'Amr ibn Akhtab (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wiped his face and prayed for his beauty. Multiple people told Abu Zayd that he reached over a hundred years of age with his head and beard remaining black except for a few white hairs in his head.
575.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Zayd 'Amr ibn Akhtab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengusap wajahnya dan mendoakan kecantikannya. Banyak orang memberitahu Abu Zayd bahwa ia mencapai usia lebih dari seratus tahun dengan kepala dan janggutnya tetap hitam kecuali beberapa helai rambut putih di kepalanya.

576.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: 'I fought alongside the Messenger of Allah ﷺ thirteen times.' Shu'bah said: 'He is the grandfather of this 'Azra.'
576.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku berperang bersama Rasulullah ﷺ tiga belas kali.' Syu'bah berkata: 'Ia adalah kakek dari 'Azra ini.'

577.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Zayd ibn Akhtab (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to him: 'May Allah make you beautiful.' Anas said: 'And he was a handsome man of good bearing.'
577.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Zayd ibn Akhtab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Semoga Allah mempercantikmu.' Anas berkata: 'Dan ia adalah seorang laki-laki tampan berpenampilan baik.'

578.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Zayd al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed by a man performing the Eid sacrifice before the Eid prayer. The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Repeat it.' The man said: 'By Allah, I only have a young sheep or a male lamb.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Slaughter it — but it will not fulfill the requirement for anyone after you.'
578.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Zayd al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melewati seorang laki-laki yang sedang menyembelih kurban sebelum shalat Eid. Nabi ﷺ berkata: 'Ulangi.' Laki-laki itu berkata: 'Demi Allah, aku hanya memiliki seekor domba muda atau anak domba jantan.' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Sembelihlah — tetapi itu tidak akan memenuhi persyaratan bagi siapapun setelahmu.'

579.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Zayd al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ led them in the Fajr prayer, then ascended the minbar and addressed them until Zuhr arrived, then descended and prayed Zuhr. Then he ascended the minbar again and addressed them until 'Asr, then descended and prayed 'Asr. He continued until sunset, informing them of all that had happened and all that would happen, including what would occur until the Day of Resurrection.
579.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Zayd al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memimpin mereka dalam shalat Subuh, kemudian naik ke mimbar dan berkhutbah kepada mereka hingga Zuhur tiba, lalu turun dan shalat Zuhur. Kemudian beliau naik ke mimbar lagi dan berkhutbah hingga Ashar, lalu turun dan shalat Ashar. Beliau terus hingga matahari terbenam, memberitahu mereka tentang semua yang telah terjadi dan semua yang akan terjadi, termasuk apa yang akan terjadi hingga Hari Kiamat.

580.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to him: 'O Abu Zayd, come close to me and rub my back.' He uncovered his back and Abu Zayd rubbed it, placing the Seal of Prophethood between his fingers. He pressed on it, and when asked what the seal was, he said: 'It was hair gathered on his shoulder.'
580.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Wahai Abu Zayd, mendekatlah kepadaku dan gosok punggungku.' Beliau membuka punggungnya dan Abu Zayd menggosoknya, meletakkan Cap Kenabian di antara jari-jarinya. Ia menekannya, dan ketika ditanya apa cap itu, ia berkata: 'Itu adalah rambut yang berkumpul di bahunya.'

581.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Zayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wiped his face and prayed for his beauty. Multiple narrators informed Abu Zayd that he reached over a hundred years of age with his head and beard remaining black, except for a few white hairs. This is a variant chain for the same incident.
581.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Zayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ mengusap wajahnya dan mendoakan kecantikannya. Beberapa perawi memberitahu Abu Zayd bahwa ia mencapai usia lebih dari seratus tahun dengan kepala dan janggutnya tetap hitam, kecuali beberapa helai rambut putih. Ini adalah sanad varian untuk kejadian yang sama.

582.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Zayd al-Ansari (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man freed six slaves at the time of his death and had no other wealth. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ cast lots among them and freed two of them, leaving four in slavery.
582.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Zayd al-Ansari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki memerdekakan enam budak pada saat kematiannya dan tidak memiliki harta lain. Rasulullah ﷺ mengundi di antara mereka dan memerdekakan dua di antaranya, meninggalkan empat dalam perbudakan.

583.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he gathered his companions and led them in prayer demonstrating the prayer of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. He arranged the men in rows, then the children behind the men, then the women behind the children. The prayer had twenty-two takbirs.
583.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mengumpulkan para sahabatnya dan memimpin mereka dalam shalat mendemonstrasikan shalat Rasulullah ﷺ. Ia mengatur para laki-laki dalam barisan, kemudian anak-anak di belakang laki-laki, kemudian para wanita di belakang anak-anak. Shalat tersebut memiliki dua puluh dua takbir.

584.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'The greatest form of misappropriation before Allah the Mighty and Majestic is a cubit of land. You will find two men as neighbors in land or a house, and one of them takes a cubit from his neighbor's share. When he takes it, it will be placed as a collar around his neck from seven earths.'
584.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Bentuk korupsi terbesar di hadapan Allah Yang Mahaperkasa lagi Mahaagung adalah sehasta tanah. Kamu akan mendapati dua orang sebagai tetangga di tanah atau rumah, dan salah seorang dari mereka mengambil sehasta dari bagian tetangganya. Ketika ia mengambilnya, itu akan dikalungkan di lehernya dari tujuh bumi.'

585.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said to his people: 'Shall I not pray for you the prayer of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ?' He arranged the men in rows, then the children behind the men, then the women behind the children. He then led them in prayer in this arrangement.
585.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata kepada kaumnya: 'Maukah aku shalat untuk kalian seperti shalat Rasulullah ﷺ?' Ia mengatur para laki-laki dalam barisan, kemudian anak-anak di belakang laki-laki, kemudian para wanita di belakang anak-anak. Ia kemudian memimpin mereka dalam shalat dengan susunan ini.

586.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) — or Malik — through Shahr ibn Hawshab that he said: 'I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: I know of people who are neither prophets nor martyrs, yet the prophets and martyrs will envy them for their rank before Allah.' When asked who they were, he said: 'They are people who loved one another for the sake of Allah, without being kin or having financial ties.'
586.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) — atau Malik — melalui Shahr ibn Hawshab bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Aku mengetahui suatu kaum yang bukan nabi dan bukan syuhada, namun para nabi dan syuhada akan iri kepada mereka karena kedudukan mereka di sisi Allah.' Ketika ditanya siapa mereka, beliau bersabda: 'Mereka adalah orang-orang yang saling mencintai karena Allah, tanpa ada hubungan kekeluargaan atau ikatan finansial.'

587.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said to his people: 'Gather — I will pray for you the prayer of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.' When they gathered he asked if there was anyone from outside among them. They said no except for a nephew. He said: 'A nephew of the people is one of them.' He then performed wudu, washing each limb three times, wiped his head, and performed the full prayer demonstrating the Prophet's ﷺ method.
587.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata kepada kaumnya: 'Berkumpullah — aku akan shalat untuk kalian seperti shalat Rasulullah ﷺ.' Ketika mereka berkumpul ia bertanya apakah ada orang luar di antara mereka. Mereka berkata tidak kecuali keponakan. Ia berkata: 'Keponakan suatu kaum adalah bagian dari mereka.' Ia kemudian berwudu, membasuh setiap anggota tiga kali, mengusap kepalanya, dan melakukan shalat penuh mendemonstrasikan metode Nabi ﷺ.

588.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) that when death approached him, he said: 'O you who hear me, O Ash'aris — let those present convey to those absent: I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: The sweetness of the world is the bitterness of the Hereafter, and the bitterness of the world is the sweetness of the Hereafter.'
588.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ketika kematian mendekat padanya, ia berkata: 'Wahai yang mendengarku, wahai orang-orang Asy'ari — hendaklah yang hadir menyampaikan kepada yang tidak hadir: Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Manisnya dunia adalah pahitnya akhirat, dan pahitnya dunia adalah manisnya akhirat.'

589.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) regarding the prohibition of nabidh (fermented drink). When someone disputed the ruling with al-Dahhak ibn Qays, Rabi'ah al-Jurashi swore: 'By Allah, the One besides Whom there is no other god, I heard it from Abu Malik al-Ash'ari who heard it from the Prophet ﷺ, and he repeated it three times.' Al-Dahhak said: 'Fie on that drink at the end of time.'
589.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) tentang larangan nabidh (minuman fermentasi). Ketika seseorang berdebat tentang hukumnya dengan al-Dahhak ibn Qays, Rabi'ah al-Jurashi bersumpah: 'Demi Allah, Yang tiada Tuhan selain-Nya, aku mendengarnya dari Abu Malik al-Ash'ari yang mendengarnya dari Nabi ﷺ, dan ia mengulanginya tiga kali.' Al-Dahhak berkata: 'Celakalah minuman itu di akhir zaman.'

590.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Purity is half of faith. Saying Alhamdulillah fills the scale. Saying SubhanAllah and Alhamdulillah fill what is between the heavens and the earth. Prayer is a light, charity is a proof, patience is a radiance, and the Quran is either a plea for you or against you.'
590.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Kesucian adalah setengah dari iman. Mengucapkan Alhamdulillah memenuhi timbangan. Mengucapkan SubhanAllah dan Alhamdulillah memenuhi apa yang ada di antara langit dan bumi. Shalat adalah cahaya, sedekah adalah bukti, kesabaran adalah sinar, dan Al-Quran adalah penghujah untukmu atau melawanmu.'

591.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Four things from the pre-Islamic period of ignorance will not be abandoned: boasting of lineage, disparaging lineages, seeking rain from stars, and wailing over the dead. The wailing woman, if she does not repent before death, will be raised on the Day of Resurrection wearing garments of pitch and a coat of scabs.'
591.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Empat hal dari masa Jahiliyah tidak akan ditinggalkan: membanggakan keturunan, merendahkan nasab, meminta hujan dari bintang, dan meratapi orang mati. Wanita yang meratap, jika ia tidak bertaubat sebelum mati, akan dibangkitkan pada hari kiamat mengenakan pakaian dari tar dan baju dari kudis.'

592.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'In my nation there are four things from the time of ignorance which they will not give up: boasting of lineage, seeking rain by stars, wailing over the dead — for the wailing woman if she does not repent before she dies will be raised on the Day of Resurrection wearing garments of tar and a coat of mange.'
592.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Dalam umatku terdapat empat hal dari masa jahiliyah yang tidak akan mereka tinggalkan: membanggakan keturunan, meminta hujan dari bintang, meratapi orang mati — bagi wanita yang meratap jika ia tidak bertaubat sebelum meninggal, ia akan dibangkitkan pada hari kiamat mengenakan pakaian dari tar dan baju dari kudis.'

593.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Indeed in Paradise there is a chamber whose exterior can be seen from its interior and whose interior can be seen from its exterior. Allah has prepared it for whoever feeds food, speaks gently, follows the fast continuously, and prays while people are sleeping.'
593.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya di surga terdapat sebuah kamar yang eksteriornya dapat dilihat dari interiornya dan interiornya dapat dilihat dari eksteriornya. Allah telah menyiapkannya bagi orang yang memberi makan, berbicara lembut, mengikuti puasa secara berkesinambungan, dan shalat sementara orang-orang sedang tidur.'

594.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he gathered his people and said: 'O Ash'aris, gather and bring your women and children.' When they gathered he said: 'Watch my prayer — this is the prayer of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ which he used to pray for us at this time of day.' Then after completing the prayer the Prophet ﷺ said: 'O people, listen and understand. Know that Allah has servants who are neither prophets nor martyrs, yet the prophets and martyrs envy them.'
594.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mengumpulkan kaumnya dan berkata: 'Wahai orang-orang Asy'ari, berkumpullah dan bawa istri dan anak-anak kalian.' Ketika mereka berkumpul ia berkata: 'Perhatikan shalatku — ini adalah shalat Rasulullah ﷺ yang biasa beliau shalat untuk kami pada waktu ini.' Kemudian setelah menyelesaikan shalat, Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Wahai manusia, dengarlah dan pahamilah. Ketahuilah bahwa Allah memiliki hamba-hamba yang bukan nabi dan bukan syuhada, namun para nabi dan syuhada iri kepada mereka.'

595.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Malik 'Ubayd (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ — as it reached him — prayed for him: 'O Allah, bless 'Ubayd, the father of Malik, and place him above many of the people.'
595.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Malik 'Ubayd (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ — sebagaimana sampai kepadanya — mendoakannya: 'Ya Allah, berkahilah 'Ubayd, ayah Malik, dan jadikan ia di atas banyak orang.'

596.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would say: 'Purity is half of faith. Saying Alhamdulillah fills the scale. Saying SubhanAllah and Allahu Akbar and La ilaha illa Allah and Allahu Akbar fills what is between the heavens and the earth. Prayer is a light, charity is a proof, patience is a radiance, and the Quran is a plea for you or against you. Every person starts his day trading his soul — either freeing it or causing its ruin.'
596.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Kesucian adalah setengah dari iman. Mengucapkan Alhamdulillah memenuhi timbangan. Mengucapkan SubhanAllah dan Allahu Akbar dan La ilaha illa Allah dan Allahu Akbar memenuhi apa yang ada di antara langit dan bumi. Shalat adalah cahaya, sedekah adalah bukti, kesabaran adalah sinar, dan Al-Quran adalah penghujah untukmu atau melawanmu. Setiap orang memulai harinya memperdagangkan jiwanya — either membebaskannya atau menghancurkannya.'

597.iwh_en: It was narrated from a Companion of the Prophet ﷺ (may Allah be pleased with him) through Mamtur that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I command you with five things: the community, listening, obeying, hijra, and jihad in the path of Allah. Whoever leaves the community by so much as a hand's span has removed the bond of Islam from his neck. Whoever calls with the call of pre-Islamic paganism is from the fuel of Hell.' A man asked: 'Even if he fasts and prays?' He said: 'Yes, even if he fasts and prays.'
597.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang Sahabat Nabi ﷺ (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui Mamtur bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku memerintahkan kalian dengan lima hal: jamaah, mendengar, taat, hijrah, dan jihad di jalan Allah. Barangsiapa meninggalkan jamaah sejauh satu jengkal tangan, ia telah melepas ikatan Islam dari lehernya. Barangsiapa menyeru dengan seruan jahiliyah adalah dari bahan bakar Neraka.' Seorang laki-laki bertanya: 'Meskipun ia berpuasa dan shalat?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, meskipun ia berpuasa dan shalat.'

598.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would make the four rak'ahs equal in recitation and standing, and would make the first rak'ah the longest.
598.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menyamakan empat rakaat dalam bacaan dan berdiri, dan menjadikan rakaat pertama yang paling panjang.

599.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Four things in my nation from pre-Islamic ignorance will not be abandoned: boasting of lineage, disparaging of lineages, seeking rain from stars, and wailing. The wailing woman — if she does not repent before death — will be raised on the Day of Resurrection wearing garments of pitch and a coat of scabs.'
599.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Empat hal dalam umatku dari jahiliyah tidak akan ditinggalkan: membanggakan keturunan, merendahkan nasab, meminta hujan dari bintang, dan meratap. Wanita yang meratap — jika ia tidak bertaubat sebelum mati — akan dibangkitkan pada hari kiamat mengenakan pakaian dari tar dan baju dari kudis.'

600.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said to his people: 'Stand up and pray until I pray for you the prayer of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.' They lined up behind him, and he said takbir, recited, said takbir, bowed, raised his head, and did this throughout his prayer — demonstrating the full prayer method of the Prophet ﷺ with all its transitions marked by takbir.
600.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Malik al-Ash'ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata kepada kaumnya: 'Berdirilah dan shalatlah hingga aku shalat untuk kalian seperti shalat Rasulullah ﷺ.' Mereka berbaris di belakangnya, dan ia mengucapkan takbir, membaca, mengucapkan takbir, ruku, mengangkat kepalanya, dan melakukan ini sepanjang shalatnya — mendemonstrasikan metode shalat penuh Nabi ﷺ dengan semua transisinya ditandai dengan takbir.
